orderId.description: The unique identifier of the order to be fulfilled.

fulfillmentRequestId.description: The unique identifier of the fulfillment request.

warehouseId.description: The unique identifier of the warehouse that will fulfill the order.

shippingMethod.description: The shipping method used for the order.

items.description: A list of items included in the order to be fulfilled, each containing product details and quantities.

productId.description: The unique identifier of the product.

sku.description: The stock keeping unit of the product.

quantity.description: The quantity of the product to fulfill.

requestedAt.description: The date and time when the fulfillment was requested.
